error[E0308]: mismatched types

error[E0599]: no method named `offset` found for reference `&{integer}` in the current scope
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/llama-3.1-8b-instruct/expressions/rel_op_c7/sample_001/target.rs:9:20

  |                    ^^^^^^ method not found in `&{integer}`

   |
